source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, in the partial control circuit of the M7130 grinding machine, which of the following is not a correct cause of "insufficient magnetic force in the electromagnetic chuck"?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The undercurrent relay KA coil is open-circuited

choice_map.A: The undercurrent relay KA coil is open-circuited
choice_map.B: The output voltage of transformer T1 is too low
choice_map.C: Poor contact at QS2 in the "engaged" position
choice_map.D: Partial short circuit in the coil of the electromagnetic chuck YH
